feature_stressed: asymmetric x AND y error bars on every point. Stress for §4 cap detection (both axes, lower≠upper).

cap_test: For each i: marker centroid at (x[i], y[i]); four caps at (x[i]-xerr_lo[i], y[i]), (x[i]+xerr_hi[i], y[i]), (x[i], y[i]+yerr_hi[i]), (x[i], y[i]-yerr_lo[i]). All visible (capsize=4).
